message:
test(e2e): add cleanup workflow end-to-end tests

207-line e2e test exercising the ntm cleanup command: verifying stale
session detection, dry-run vs live deletion, JSON output parsing with
path/type/size/age fields, and age-based filtering. Tagged with build
constraint e2e so it only runs when explicitly requested.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
